title: Low mood follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting low mood, loss of interest, duration, course, functional, interpersonal and social difficulty, previous mood history, physical and mental comorbidity, sleep, stressful events, medicines, substances, loneliness and support.

source.title: Depression in adults: treatment and management — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE mental-health, crisis, referral, and legal adaptation
source.population: Adults with possible or diagnosed depression; communication and carer involvement are qualified.
source.setting: Primary and mental healthcare recognition and assessment.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting mood and interest screening, duration, course, function, social and interpersonal context, sleep, substances, medicines, loneliness and clinician-completed risk assessment. It does not diagnose depression or generate a referral or treatment.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.7 — recognition, comprehensive assessment, function, and context

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting low mood, loss of interest, duration, course, functional, interpersonal and social difficulty, previous mood history, physical and mental comorbidity, sleep, stressful events, medicines, substances, loneliness and support.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented supportive discussion, questions, safety planning, treatment or medication decisions, monitoring, follow-up, and referral without autonomous treatment selection or doses.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Depression
source.population: Adults presenting with suspected or established depressive symptoms; emergency, severe, psychotic, bipolar, or safeguarding presentations require escalation.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth depression documentation and risk screening; treatment, diagnosis, and local emergency pathways remain clinician-led.
